test.command: cd /home/ubuntu/git-repos/slop-code-bench && uv run pytest tests/runner/ tests/analysis/ -q --no-header 2>/dev/null || uv run pytest tests/runner/ -q --no-header

typecheck.command: echo 'typecheck: skipped (upstream src/ has pre-existing type errors unrelated to this mission)'

lint.command: cd /home/ubuntu/git-repos/slop-code-bench && if [ -d tests/analysis ]; then uv run ruff check research/ tests/runner/ tests/analysis/ .factory/; else uv run ruff check research/ tests/runner/ .factory/; fi

blockingIssues.description: research/analysis/query_experiments.py:305 in query_pass_rate_delta uses alias qualification e2.{VALIDATION_FILTER}/e1.{VALIDATION_FILTER}; results_valid remains unqualified in the self-join and raises an ambiguous-column runtime error.
tests/runner/test_e2e_experiment_lifecycle.py:491 validates only gt sling --dry-run output and does not verify that pouring creates a molecule with six step beads and dependency edges.

tests/runner/test_e2e_experiment_lifecycle.py:1089 does not validate true conclusion linkage. It creates hard-coded conclusion metadata without verifying referenced experiment rows for the same hypothesis and without backward trace.

tests/runner/test_e2e_experiment_lifecycle.py:1301 (test_experiment_to_conclusion_traceable) never touches conclusion beads, so the required hypothesis -> experiment -> conclusion provenance chain is not exercised.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add mission-aware validator guidance that explicitly prioritizes .factory/services.yaml commands over generic full-repo checks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: analysis-scripts review observed conflict between python-worker generic guidance (uv run pytest -q, ruff check .) and mission-scoped validator contract in AGENTS.md and .factory/services.yaml.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify boundary wording so mission code may include tests under tests/runner and tests/analysis while implementation logic remains in research/.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: crash-resilience review found ambiguity between 'research/-only' boundary text and validator scope that explicitly includes tests/runner and tests/analysis.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the hq beads DB prerequisite for gt convoy and gt escalate flows (initialize status.custom and issue_prefix or equivalent setup) before attempting those commands.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: e2e-experiment-lifecycle review cites repeated convoy/escalation failures tied to missing hq DB initialization, observed in worker handoff/discovered issues.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit safe-cleanup conventions for shared beads state in integration tests to avoid broad deletes and accidental removal of mission infrastructure epics.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: e2e-experiment-lifecycle review recorded cleanup side effects requiring recreation of sc-hypotheses.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce consistency between tests-first requirement and skill feedback reporting, or relax wording to match accepted workflow when implementation-first is used.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: analysis-scripts review observed implementation occurring before tests while skillFeedback.followedProcedure remained true against tests-first wording.
